titleStmt.title: SII 28.274: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 274. (A.R. No. 428 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, on the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front.

p.hi: Kṛishṇadēva-mahārāya Śaka 1436, Yuva, Mithuna śu. 5, Monday, Aśvati, Irregular.
p.note: In Śaka year 1436 (expired). Mithuna śu. 5, was Monday (=1514 A.D., June 26, f.d.t. ·03). But the asterism that coincided with that date was Maghā .05, and Purvva-phalguni thereafter. The coincidence of śu. 5 with Aśvati can occur only in Kumbha month.

summary.p: Records that the local subordinate chief Eṟamāñchi Akki-Timmaya-nāyakkar in association with the Śrī-Bhaṇḍārattār and Śrī-Māhēsvarar of the temple of Tirukkāmīchuramuḍaiya-tambirāṉār, in Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Magaḍaimaṇḍalam granted a charter (paṭṭayam) in respect of land of an area of 250 kuḻi of wet land, including that which he had himself reclaimed (tiṟuttina) to the north-east of Kāliyammai-nāchchiyār-kōyil, as tax-free under the (arrangement of ūr (ūramai iṟai-ili) to the Ūrāṇḍār, son of Veṅkaḍam of the ūr.
The continuation of the record containing further details of the grant is built in.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran bhāṣaikku tappum Irāyar kaṇḍan muvarāyar kaṇṭan metini mica
ra kaṇṭan kaṭṭāri cāḷuvan kiṟuṭiṇa tevamahārāyar prathuvi rājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāptam
1000 4 100 3 10 6 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa yuva samvatsarattu mituna nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum comavāramum peṟṟa
Acuvatiṉāḷ śrīmanmahānāyaṅkācāriyan bhāṣaikku tappum nāyaṅkar kaṇṭan nāḷokara kaṇṭan vaṅki nārāyaṇan maṟai
pukkār kāvalan ceracoḻa pāṇṭiya vallāḷarāya payaṅkaran yātavarāya sthāpanācāriyan campuvarāya cavuttaraṅka vayiri cāṭikkāṟar
kaṇṭan śrīmatuṟamāñci Akki timmaya nāyakkarum makatai maṇṭalattu Āṟṟūṟ kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷūr nayiṉār tirukkāmicuramuṭai
ya tampirāṉār koyil śrīpaṇṭārattārum śrīmāyecurarum Ivvūr veṅkaṭam makaṉ Ūrāṇṭāṟkku Ūramai Iṟaiyili paṭṭaiyam kuṭutta
paṭi kāḷiyammai nācciyār koyilukku vaṭakiḻakku muṉṉāḷ tāṉ tiruttiṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa nañcai nilam 2 100 5 10 kuḻiyum Akaḻukkuḷa pa
yiṟceytu koṇṭu puñcai Oraṇai Eṟakku māṉi tāṉattāṟkku piṉpu Ūṟkku muṉ ca ṉ tiram built in.
Digital edition of SII 28.274 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
